title: Swinney would 'consider' US military plane ban from Prestwick Airport

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: Swinney would 'consider' US military plane ban from Prestwick Airport. First Minister John Swinney has said he would consider banning US military aircraft from using state-owned Prestwick Airport if it was...
